6/6                                                    ╭──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
> [MEDIUM] Service is published on a public i…         │ Service is published on a public interface
vaultwarden                                            │
  [HIGH] Service should sit behind a revers…           │ ID: exposure.public_binding
vaultwarden                                            │ Severity: MEDIUM | Axis: Unnecessary Exposure
  [LOW] Container allows privilege escalat…            │ Source: native_compose | Scope: service
vaultwarden                                            │ Service: vaultwarden
  [LOW] Container root filesystem is writa…            │ Fix: Review Required
vaultwarden                                            │
  [LOW] Stack relies on the default bridge…            │ Description:
vaultwarden                                            │ vaultwarden publishes 8080:80 on a publicly reachable
  [HIGH] Vaultwarden domain is configured f…           │ host interface.
vaultwarden                                            │
                                                       │ Why it's risky:
                                                       │ Public bindings increase the attack surface. Services
                                                       │ should bind to localhost when a reverse proxy handles
                                                       │ external traffic.
                                                       │
                                                       │ How to fix:
                                                       │ Bind the port to 127.0.0.1:
                                                       │   ports:
                                                       │     - "127.0.0.1:8080:80"
                                                       │
                                                       │ Evidence:
                                                       │   port: 8080:80
                                                       │
                                                       ╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
